full_text:
An update for dnf is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

dnf is a package manager that allows users to manage packages on their systems. It supports RPMs, modules and comps groups & environments.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Missing "deprecation" warning for the module namespace [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-104310)  dnf-automatic cannot detect releasever_minor [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-108617)
